title: wedelia urbanii
intro: Wedelia urbanii, also known as Wedelia or Mexican Tarragon, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fragrant leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia urbanii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
